description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a predominantly gray and gold color scheme, featuring a sleek, stealth-inspired design. The wings are sharply swept back with gold-tipped edges and subtle weathering effects, giving it a rugged, battle-worn appearance. The cockpit is centrally located and enclosed with a dark, faceted canopy, suggesting advanced avionics and limited visibility from the outside. Twin jet exhausts are visible at the rear, indicating a high-performance propulsion system. The fuselage is compact and blends smoothly into the wings, with minimal protrusions except for the landing gear and winglets. Distinctive markings, such as insignias and painted details, add to its military or sci-fi aesthetic.
description: A sleek, gray and gold futuristic airplane with swept-back wings, a central enclosed cockpit, and twin rear jet exhausts, featuring weathered textures and military-style markings.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular nose, central cockpit canopy, and sharply swept wings with gold accents.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the wing's sweep, gold weathering, and visible insignia on the fuselage.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin jet exhausts, gold-tipped wings, and the compact, streamlined fuselage.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the gold weathering, wing structure, and cockpit placement.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept, angular wings and upward-canted winglets; no visible dihedral or anhedral.
attribute_engine_type: Twin rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with twin vertical stabilizers extending from the ends of the horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear and one nose gear visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a faceted canopy integrated into the fuselage.
